---
title: "Volume I: Foundations"
---

## Introduction to Machine Learning Systems

17 decks covering the full single-machine ML stack: from data engineering and neural network computation through training, compression, hardware acceleration, and deployment. 570 slides, 141 SVG figures, approximately 19 hours of teaching material.

```{=html}
<div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/MLSysBook-Slides-Vol1-PDF.zip" class="btn-accent" target="_blank">Download All PDFs (ZIP)</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/MLSysBook-Slides-Vol1-PPTX.zip" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">Download All PPTX (ZIP)</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">View Source</a>
</div>

<table class="slide-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Ch</th>
      <th>Title</th>
      <th class="num-col">Slides</th>
      <th class="num-col">SVGs</th>
      <th class="num-col">~Time</th>
      <th class="num-col">Active Learning</th>
      <th class="dl-col">PDF</th>
      <th class="dl-col">PPTX</th>
      <th class="dl-col">Source</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>0</td>
      <td>Course Overview</td>
      <td class="num-col">27</td>
      <td class="num-col">5</td>
      <td class="num-col">53 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_00_course_overview.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_00_course_overview.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/00_course_overview" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1</td>
      <td>Introduction</td>
      <td class="num-col">36</td>
      <td class="num-col">17</td>
      <td class="num-col">74 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_01_introduction.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_01_introduction.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/01_introduction" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2</td>
      <td>ML Systems</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">70 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_02_ml_systems.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_02_ml_systems.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/02_ml_systems" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3</td>
      <td>ML Workflow</td>
      <td class="num-col">36</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">79 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_03_ml_workflow.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_03_ml_workflow.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/03_ml_workflow" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4</td>
      <td>Data Engineering</td>
      <td class="num-col">31</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">66 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_04_data_engineering.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_04_data_engineering.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/04_data_engineering" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5</td>
      <td>Neural Network Computation</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">68 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_05_nn_computation.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_05_nn_computation.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/05_nn_computation" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6</td>
      <td>Network Architectures</td>
      <td class="num-col">30</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">63 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_06_nn_architectures.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_06_nn_architectures.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/06_nn_architectures" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7</td>
      <td>ML Frameworks</td>
      <td class="num-col">34</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">73 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_07_frameworks.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_07_frameworks.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/07_frameworks" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8</td>
      <td>Model Training</td>
      <td class="num-col">34</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">68 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_08_training.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_08_training.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/08_training" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9</td>
      <td>Data Selection</td>
      <td class="num-col">30</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">63 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_09_data_selection.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_09_data_selection.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/09_data_selection" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>10</td>
      <td>Model Compression</td>
      <td class="num-col">30</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">64 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_10_model_compression.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_10_model_compression.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/10_model_compression" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>11</td>
      <td>Hardware Acceleration</td>
      <td class="num-col">31</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">66 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_11_hw_acceleration.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_11_hw_acceleration.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/11_hw_acceleration" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>12</td>
      <td>Benchmarking</td>
      <td class="num-col">32</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">68 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_12_benchmarking.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_12_benchmarking.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/12_benchmarking" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>13</td>
      <td>Model Serving</td>
      <td class="num-col">35</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">74 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_13_model_serving.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_13_model_serving.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/13_model_serving" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>14</td>
      <td>ML Operations</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">6</td>
      <td class="num-col">69 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_14_ml_ops.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_14_ml_ops.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/14_ml_ops" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>15</td>
      <td>Responsible Engineering</td>
      <td class="num-col">30</td>
      <td class="num-col">5</td>
      <td class="num-col">61 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_15_responsible_engr.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_15_responsible_engr.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/15_responsible_engr" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>16</td>
      <td>Conclusion</td>
      <td class="num-col">25</td>
      <td class="num-col">5</td>
      <td class="num-col">51 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_16_conclusion.pdf" target="_blank">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/releases/download/slides-latest/vol1_16_conclusion.pptx" target="_blank">PPTX</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/dev/slides/vol1/16_conclusion" target="_blank">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
  <tfoot>
    <tr style="font-weight: 600; border-top: 2px solid #BE185D;">
      <td></td>
      <td>Total</td>
      <td class="num-col">570</td>
      <td class="num-col">141</td>
      <td class="num-col">~19 hrs</td>
      <td class="num-col">145</td>
      <td class="dl-col"></td>
      <td class="dl-col"></td>
      <td class="dl-col"></td>
    </tr>
  </tfoot>
</table>
```

::: {.callout-tip}
**PPTX files** are image-based (300 DPI) — visually identical to the PDF. Use them for PowerPoint presenter mode and slide annotations. For editable slides, download the LaTeX source.
:::
